name: nanites
description: Model guidance for creating, testing, and debugging self-hosted Nanites.

interface.shortDescription: Create, test, and debug durable GitHub Nanites through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Teaches agents how to use a Nanites deployment MCP server, author thin Nanite manifests, write generated trigger handlers, run acceptance tests, inspect failed runs, and keep Nanite operating knowledge aligned with the current runtime model. The plugin does not bundle an MCP URL; add your deployment's /mcp endpoint separately.
defaultPrompt: Create a Nanite for this repo
